name: Loveland Farmers Market at Fairgrounds Park

Products.value: Local produce, dairy, meat, poultry, baked goods, craft beer, bath and body care, artisan goods, and concessions

notes: The on-file website (lovgov.org/services/parks-recreation/events/farmers-market) is confirmed as the correct official City of Loveland page for this market, though it blocks direct automated fetches (HTTP 403); details were confirmed via search-engine cached snippets of that same page. Confirmed: market runs Sundays 9am-1pm, June 7 - Sept 27 (2026 season dates), at Fairgrounds Park, 700 S Railroad Ave, and accepts SNAP/Double Up (up to $20/week matched for CO-grown produce). Facebook on file (City of Loveland Farmers Market) matches. Could not find a clearly stated market-specific email, phone, Instagram, ADA accessibility statement, or certified-organic status on official sources, so these were omitted. No better/more specific address than the one already on file (700 S Railroad Ave, 80537) was found.
